nodes.name: Ash-throated flycatcher
nodes.summary: Ash-throated flycatcher（Ash-throated flycatcher，学名 Myiarchus cinerascens），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于墨西哥，主要威胁包括污染。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 墨西哥
nodes.summary: 墨西哥是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联249种鸟类，包括灰胸穴䳍、棕穴䳍、草黃樹鴨等249种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 污染
nodes.summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It breeds in desert scrub, riparian forest, brushy pastures and open woodland from the western United States to central Mexico

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Because of its extensive range, very large population, and generally increasing numbers, the ash-throated flycatcher has been listed as a species of least concern by the International Union for Conservation of Nature. It is one of the species protected by the Migratory Bird Treaty Act. In the United States, the creation of bluebird trails, a network of nest boxes put out for the continent's three bluebird species, may benefit ash-throated flycatchers as they will also use the boxes. Ash-throated flycatchers have been found to be negatively affected by noise pollution
